name: Folder watch + Loop + AI Extract + Excel
description: Plan-to-commands evaluation captured from production log on 2026-04-30 at 15:38:54.
user_prompt:
Convert this workflow plan to JSON commands:

Workflow plan: Invoice PDF extraction to Excel

Note: There is no trigger node in this platform. Build the workflow starting with file selection, and after the workflow is built, create a separate schedule that runs it on a recurring basis to watch C:\\incoming\\invoices for new files.

1. Add a Folder Selector node.
   - Purpose: Select invoice PDF files from the incoming folder.
   - Configuration:
     - folderPath: C:\\incoming\\invoices
     - selectionMode: pattern
     - filePattern: *.pdf
     - outputVariable: selectedInvoiceFiles
     - failIfEmpty: false
   - Reasonable default: if no PDFs are present, the workflow should simply do nothing instead of failing.

2. Add a Loop node.
   - Purpose: Process each PDF file one at a time.
   - Configuration:
     - sourceType: variable
     - loopSource: ${selectedInvoiceFiles}
     - itemVariable: currentInvoiceFile
     - indexVariable: fileIndex
     - maxIterations: 1000
     - emptyBehavior: skip
   - Important: All nodes inside the loop must reference ${currentInvoiceFile}, not ${selectedInvoiceFiles}.

3. Inside the loop, add an AI Extract node.
   - Purpose: Read the current PDF invoice directly and extract structured invoice fields.
   - Configuration:
     - inputSource: auto
     - inputVariable: ${currentInvoiceFile}
     - outputVariable: extractedInvoice
     - failOnMissingRequired: false
     - specialInstructions: Extract the invoice number exactly as shown on the document. Extract total_amount as a numeric value only, without currency symbols or commas. If multiple totals appear, use the final amount due / invoice total that represents the amount to be paid.
     - fields:
       - name: invoice_number
         type: text
         required: false
         description: Invoice number or invoice identifier exactly as shown on the invoice PDF.
       - name: total_amount
         type: number
         required: false
         description: Final total invoice amount due as a number only, without currency symbols, commas, or text.

4. Still inside the loop, add an Excel Export node.
   - Purpose: Append one extracted invoice row per processed PDF into the Excel workbook.
   - Configuration:
     - inputVariable: ${extractedInvoice}
     - flattenArray: false
     - manualFields: invoice_number,total_amount
     - excelOutputPath: C:\\incoming\\invoices\\invoices.xlsx
     - excelOperation: append
     - excelTemplatePath: C:\\incoming\\invoices\\invoices.xlsx
     - excelSheetName: Invoices
     - mappingMode: manual
     - fieldMapping:
       - invoice_number -> invoice_number
       - total_amount -> total_amount
   - Reasonable default: append each extracted object as a single row.

5. Add an End Loop node.
   - Purpose: Close the loop and continue iteration for the next file.
   - Configuration: standard End Loop paired to the Loop node.
   - Connection rule: End Loop must have exactly one outgoing pass connection back to the Loop node.

6. Connections:
   - Folder Selector pass -> Loop
   - Loop pass -> AI Extract
   - AI Extract pass -> Excel Export
   - Excel Export pass -> End Loop
   - End Loop pass -> Loop

7. Scheduling note to implement after build:
   - Create a separate schedule outside the workflow to run this workflow periodically, for example every 5 minutes, so it watches C:\\incoming\\invoices for new PDF files.

8. Default behavior notes:
   - This workflow processes all matching PDFs found each run.
   - It appends extracted rows into C:\\incoming\\invoices\\invoices.xlsx on sheet Invoices.
   - Missing fields do not fail the run; blank values are allowed.
   - No file archiving or deduplication is included in this first version.
